summary: Iteration 252 - Collective Resonance Dashboard Testing Complete. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). All resonance endpoints working: GET /api/resonance/global returns global_density (88.9%), cross_cluster_resonance, cluster_heatmap (4×4), surge status with effects, total_users_in_matrix. GET /api/resonance/heatmap returns condensed 4×4 cluster heatmap. GET /api/resonance/matrix returns full 24×24 global matrix (auth required). GET /api/resonance/surge returns Harmony Surge status with triggers and effects. POST /api/resonance/trigger-aggregation manually triggers aggregation. POST /api/broker/trade uses 0.5% commerce fee during surge. POST /api/broker/transmute uses 60:1 ratio during surge. Frontend: CollectiveResonance panel accessible via 'Live' button in Orbital Mixer Playground, shows Global Density (88.9%), Surge State (Active), HARMONY SURGE indicator, surge effects (0.5% fee, -40% transmute), 4×4 cluster resonance map, WebGL shader canvas. H² button, Community button, SmartDock wallet badge (60|4) all working.
critical_code_review_comments: collective_resonance.py: aggregate_global_matrix() pulls H² tensors from all users and computes element-wise average
collective_resonance.py: compute_global_density() calculates ratio of non-zero cells in 24×24 matrix
collective_resonance.py: compute_global_resonance() calculates cross-cluster resonance for all cluster pairs
collective_resonance.py: detect_surge() triggers Harmony Surge when density >= 0.85 OR any cross-cluster pair >= 0.85
collective_resonance.py: compute_cluster_heatmap() condenses 24×24 to 4×4 by averaging 6×6 sub-blocks
collective_resonance.py: resonance_aggregation_loop() runs every 60 seconds as background task
CollectiveResonance.js: WebGL shader with VERTEX_SHADER and FRAGMENT_SHADER for heatmap visualization
CollectiveResonance.js: ResonanceCanvas component renders animated interference field with golden shimmer during surge
CollectiveResonance.js: Shows Global Density percentage, Surge State, HARMONY SURGE indicator
CollectiveResonance.js: 4×4 cluster resonance map grid with intensity-based coloring
CollectiveResonance.js: Cross-cluster resonance bars with percentages and threshold indicators
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (has ~60 dust, 4 gems)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 252 verified Collective Resonance Dashboard: (1) GET /api/resonance/global returns global_density, cross_cluster_resonance, cluster_heatmap (4×4), surge status with effects, total_users_in_matrix. (2) GET /api/resonance/heatmap returns condensed 4×4 cluster heatmap. (3) GET /api/resonance/matrix returns full 24×24 global matrix (auth required). (4) GET /api/resonance/surge returns Harmony Surge status with triggers and effects. (5) POST /api/resonance/trigger-aggregation manually triggers aggregation cycle. (6) POST /api/broker/trade uses 0.5% commerce fee during Harmony Surge (not 2%). (7) POST /api/broker/transmute uses 60:1 ratio during surge (not 100:1, 40% discount). (8) POST /api/quad-hex/resolve-h2 still returns 24×24 h2_matrix. (9) GET /api/bank/wallet returns dual currency (dust, gems). (10) POST /api/sentinel/scan is phase-aware. (11) Frontend: 'Live' button in Orbital Mixer Playground opens CollectiveResonance panel. (12) Panel shows Global Density (88.9%), Surge State (Active), HARMONY SURGE indicator, surge effects (0.5% fee, -40% transmute), 4×4 cluster resonance map, WebGL shader canvas with golden shimmer. (13) H² button still works and shows HexagramGrid panel. (14) Community button visible with notification dot support. (15) SmartDock shows dust|gems wallet badge (60|4). (16) Background aggregation runs every 60 seconds. (17) Surge is currently ACTIVE due to density 88.9% > 85% threshold.
